```{r}
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        title = element_text(size=24, face="bold"),
        axis.line = element_line(size=0.8),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.8),
        axis.text = element_text(size=16, colour="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=18, face="bold"),
        strip.background.y = element_blank(), 
        strip.placement = "outside",
        strip.text=element_text(size=18, face="bold"))
  ggsave(paste0("doreco_graphs_v1/vl/derivative_curves_", m, ".png"), width=15, height=15, dpi=300)
}
```

## Comparing VL Model Density-Weighted Effect Sizes

Comparing predicted phone durations and slopes for VL models

```{r}
for (m in mods_vln_mono_pos) {
  eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m <- eff_sizes_dw_vln_mono[[m]]
  
  eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider <- eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = syll_pos,
              values_from = c(eff_size_med,
                              derivative_nc,
                              derivative_cs,
                              derivative_cl,
                              phone_dur_nc,
                              phone_dur_cs,
                              phone_dur_cl,
                              eff_size_dw,
                              derivative_nc_dw,
                              derivative_cs_dw,
                              derivative_cl_dw,
                              phone_dur_nc_dw,
                              phone_dur_cs_dw,
                              phone_dur_cl_dw))
  
  eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m %>%
  ggplot() +
    facet_wrap(~vowel_length_contrast) +
    geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_nc_dw,y=derivative_nc_dw,shape=syll_pos),col="magenta") +
    geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw,y=derivative_cl_dw,shape=syll_pos),col="blue") +
    geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_cs_dw,y=derivative_cs_dw,shape=syll_pos),col="limegreen") +
    geom_segment(aes(x = phone_dur_cs_dw, xend=phone_dur_cl_dw,
                     y = derivative_cs_dw, yend=derivative_cl_dw,
                     col = vowel_length_contrast)) +
    geom_segment(data = eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider,
                   aes(x = phone_dur_nc_dw_final, xend=phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                     y = derivative_nc_dw_final, yend=derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                     col = vowel_length_contrast),
                 linetype="dashed") +
    geom_segment(data = eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider,
                 aes(x = phone_dur_nc_dw_final, xend=phone_dur_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                     y = derivative_nc_dw_final, yend=derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                     col = vowel_length_contrast),
                 linetype="dashed") +
    geom_segment(data = eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider,
                   aes(x = phone_dur_nc_dw_final, xend=phone_dur_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                     y = derivative_nc_dw_final, yend=derivative_nc_dw_nonfinal),
                 linetype="dashed") +
    geom_segment(data = eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider,
                   aes(x = phone_dur_cl_dw_final, xend=phone_dur_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                     y = derivative_cl_dw_final, yend=derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal),
                 linetype="dashed") +
    geom_segment(data = eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider,
                   aes(x = phone_dur_cs_dw_final, xend=phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                     y = derivative_cs_dw_final, yend=derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal),
                 linetype="dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("unrestricted" = "black",
                                "restricted" = "red")) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks=c(0.067,0.1,0.15)) +
    xlab("Predicted individual phone duration (density weighted)") +
    labs(y = "β_dw") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(size=0.8),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.8),
        axis.text = element_text(size=16, colour="black"),
        axis.title = element_text(size=18, face="bold"),
        strip.background.y = element_blank(), 
        strip.placement = "outside",
        strip.text=element_text(size=18, face="bold"))
  ggsave(paste0("doreco_graphs_v1/vl/vl_deriv_preds_all_dw_", m, ".png"), width=12, height=5, dpi=300)
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
m<-"vln_mod_mono_full"

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m <- eff_sizes_dw_vln_mono[[m]]
  
eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider <- eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m %>%
pivot_wider(names_from = syll_pos,
            values_from = c(eff_size_med,
                            derivative_nc,
                            derivative_cs,
                            derivative_cl,
                            phone_dur_nc,
                            phone_dur_cs,
                            phone_dur_cl,
                            eff_size_dw,
                            derivative_nc_dw,
                            derivative_cs_dw,
                            derivative_cl_dw,
                            phone_dur_nc_dw,
                            phone_dur_cs_dw,
                            phone_dur_cl_dw))

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider %>%
  ggplot() +
  #facet_wrap(~vowel_length_contrast) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=1), color="red") +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=phone_dur_nc_dw_final/phone_dur_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_nc_dw_final/phone_dur_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw_final/phone_dur_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_long",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw_final/phone_dur_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_long",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=phone_dur_cs_dw_final/phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_cs_dw_final/phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=phone_dur_nc_dw_final/phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast vs contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_nc_dw_final/phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast vs contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("unrestricted" = "blue",
                               "restricted" = "red",
                               "none" = "magenta")) +
  labs(title = "Final Lengthening")

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider %>%
  ggplot() +
  #facet_wrap(~vowel_length_contrast) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=0), color="red") +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_nc_dw_final-derivative_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_nc_dw_final-derivative_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_final-derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_long",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_final-derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_long",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_cs_dw_final-derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_cs_dw_final-derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_nc_dw_final-derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast vs contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_nc_dw_final-derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast vs contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("unrestricted" = "blue",
                               "restricted" = "red",
                               "none" = "magenta")) +
  labs(title = "Final Stretchening")

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider %>%
  ggplot() +
  #facet_wrap(~vowel_length_contrast) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=1), color="red") +
  geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw_final/phone_dur_cs_dw_final,
                   y="final",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw_final/phone_dur_cs_dw_final,
                   y="final",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw_nonfinal/phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="nonfinal",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=phone_dur_cl_dw_nonfinal/phone_dur_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="nonfinal",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("unrestricted" = "blue",
                               "restricted" = "red",
                               "none" = "magenta")) +
  labs(title = "Long Lengthening")

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider %>%
  ggplot() +
  #facet_wrap(~vowel_length_contrast) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=0), color="red") +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_final-derivative_cs_dw_final,
                   y="final",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_final-derivative_cs_dw_final,
                   y="final",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal-derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="nonfinal",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal-derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="nonfinal",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("unrestricted" = "blue",
                               "restricted" = "red",
                               "none" = "magenta")) +
  labs(title = "Long Stretchening")
```
```{r}
m<-"vln_mod_mono_full"

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m <- eff_sizes_dw_vln_mono[[m]]
  
eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider <- eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m %>%
pivot_wider(names_from = syll_pos,
            values_from = c(eff_size_med,
                            derivative_nc,
                            derivative_cs,
                            derivative_cl,
                            phone_dur_nc,
                            phone_dur_cs,
                            phone_dur_cl,
                            eff_size_dw,
                            derivative_nc_dw,
                            derivative_cs_dw,
                            derivative_cl_dw,
                            phone_dur_nc_dw,
                            phone_dur_cs_dw,
                            phone_dur_cl_dw))

eff_sizes_vln_mono_pos_m_wider %>%
  ggplot() +
  #facet_wrap(~vowel_length_contrast) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=0), color="red") +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_nc_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="no_contrast",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_long",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_cl_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_long",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x=derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),alpha=0.25) +
  geom_point(aes(x=derivative_cs_dw_nonfinal,
                   y="contrast_short",
                   fill = vowel_length_contrast),shape=21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("unrestricted" = "blue",
                               "restricted" = "red",
                               "none" = "magenta")) +
  labs(title = "Stretchiness by Vowel Length")
```
